title: Merge the build-fingerprint worktree into main and settle the third PBI id collision
action: Merge wt/health-fingerprint into main. Union merge resolves every jsonl ledger; docs/backlog.md conflicts because main moved PBI-033 to done and shipped PBI-036/PBI-037 while the branch still carried the older table. Keep main's rows, take only the branch's own completed PBI-034 row, and renumber the branch's new deferred idea to PBI-038 since PBI-036 and PBI-037 are both taken. Run the configured verify against the merged tree before committing, then remove the worktree, delete the branch and drop the grant.

truths: No conflict markers remain in docs/backlog.md
Every PBI id introduced by this merge is unique
The configured verify passes against the merged tree before the merge is committed
The worktree, its branch and its grant are all gone afterwards

artifacts.substantive: PBI-034 done, PBI-038 replaces the colliding PBI-036

prohibitions: Do not auto-resolve the markdown conflict with a merge driver -- the rows carry human meaning
Do not commit the merge on a red verify

verify: test -z "$(grep -c '^<<<<<<<' docs/backlog.md | grep -v '^0$')" && test -z "$(grep -o '^| PBI-0[0-9][0-9]' docs/backlog.md | sort | uniq -d | grep -v 'PBI-031\|PBI-032')" && echo BACKLOG_OK

trace.outcome: Merged wt/health-fingerprint into main, resolved the backlog table by hand, renumbered the colliding PBI-036 to PBI-038, worktree and branch removed
trace.verify_output: Rust: 273 passed / 0 failed (up from 271 -- the build-fingerprint feature adds 2). fmt --check clean. clippy -D warnings clean. rename_contract ok. web: 5 files, 79 tests passed. Run against the merged-but-uncommitted tree before the merge commit.
trace.verify_command: cargo test --quiet && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && bash tests/rename_contract.sh && cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
